problem_statement: Existing LLM-based software development agents are evaluated only on historical benchmarks, rarely incorporate human feedback at each stage, and are not deployed in practice, leaving open how oversight can keep AI-generated plans and code aligned with human expectations in enterprise settings.
magnitude_evidence: In 2024, Atlassian had over 12,000 engineers submitting over 950,000 pull requests
insufficiency_evidence: Without human involvement, 33% of participants agreed the generated code solved their task; 54% and 67% disagreed the code contains no defects/fulfilled non-functional requirements and completely solved the task without human involvement, respectively
solution_mechanisms: AI Planner Agent for file localization and plan generation
AI Coding Agent for code changes
human review/edit/re-generate at plan and code stages
